title: APIv2 is now super-slow
body:
In window 1:
```console
$ ./bin/podman system service --timeout 10 tcp:127.0.0.1:5001
```
First thing to note: even though the `--timeout 10` should make it exit almost instantaneously, it doesn't. It just sits there. (It eventually exits, maybe 3 minutes later; I haven't done exact timing).

Next, try a trivial query:
```
$ time curl http://localhost:5001/v1.40/version
...
curl http://localhost:5001/v1.40/version  0.01s user 0.01s system 0% cpu 1.629 total
                                                                         ^^^^^^^^^^^
```
That's 1.6 seconds for something that (in previous commits) was 0.07 seconds.

Bisecting shows #5158 to be the culprit. That's way too big a commit for me to grok, so I can't identify the root cause; sorry.
